summary: Iteration 41b — Instant Match Simulator fully verified. Backend: 13/13 tests in test_iteration41b.py PASS (RBAC manager+only, non-persistence, deterministic text extraction, overrides priority, unknown-needs filter, output shape, TXT upload, PDF upload, .exe rejection, >200KB rejection, save-as-referral flow). Regression on iter41 (14 tests) + iter40b (9 tests) GREEN. Frontend: manager flow end-to-end works — simulator opens, non-binding notice persistent, all 3 mode tabs present, paste-mode submission produces full result page (confidence banner, extracted preview, group dynamics, what-needs-to-change, footer reminder), warning click opens factor-modal, 'Save as formal referral' opens prefilled editor with all extracted values (AB / 14 / male / Sara Khan / Urgent / S20 / Missing+CSE / JM,AT / High exploitation+absconding risk). Staff RBAC graceful — button visible, API returns 403, no JS crash. Adult Services Hub does NOT expose simulator or referrals tab (sector boundary intact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is still 9000+ lines — the iter41b simulator endpoints (POST /api/placement-intelligence/simulate and /simulate/save) should ideally live in a dedicated router along with the rest of placement_intelligence. Same observation as iter41 — not a blocker.
Good: deterministic extraction verified (identical input → identical extracted dict and matching_confidence/score across runs).
Good: simulator never persists (before/after referrals count identical).
Good: overrides_json correctly take priority over text-extracted fields and unknown enum values are filtered out server-side.
Good: non_binding_notice and is_simulation=true are always present in the response, and the same notice is rendered as a persistent banner in both the input form and the result view.
Good: file_kind/used_file/source_meta surface upload provenance so the UI can show the user where extracted text came from.
Good: .exe and >200KB inputs cleanly rejected with 400 — proper input validation, no leaks to the engine.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (every required data-testid found and verified end-to-end)

test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123, admin@care.local / Admin@123, senior@care.local / Senior@123, staff@care.local / Staff@123 — all confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: test_save_simulation_as_referral creates a referral via /simulate/save then cleans it up via admin DELETE in the test body. No residual TEST data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 41b is fully green. The simulator lives at /children?tab=referrals → 'Run match simulation' (data-testid='simulator-open-btn'). All simulator testids: simulator, simulator-non-binding-notice, simulator-mode-tabs, sim-mode-{paste|upload|quick}, sim-paste-textarea, sim-file-input, sim-upload-textarea, sim-quick-form, sim-q-initials, sim-q-age, sim-q-need-* (chips), sim-run-btn. Result page: sim-confidence-banner, sim-extracted-preview, sim-extraction-evidence, sim-group-dynamics, sim-warning-{domain}, sim-what-needs-to-change, sim-footer-reminder, sim-save-as-referral. Save-as-referral opens the standard referral-editor (ref-initials, referral-save-btn) prefilled from extracted+overrides. RBAC: manager/admin only on backend; staff/senior get 403. Adult sector (/adults) intentionally excludes the simulator and referrals tab. Backend tests must be run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported from frontend/.env (cd /app && export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && pytest backend/tests/test_iteration41b.py -v).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues to RCA — all 13 backend tests, the frontend manager simulator flow, the staff RBAC graceful-degradation path, and the adult-services sector boundary all behave exactly as specified.
